title: Better Optimizer
description: Better Optimizer a copy of simply optimizer and other optimized modpacks this modpack has a lot of optimized mod but it does not support modernfix and fastchests
body: Better Optimizer a copy of simply optimizer and other optimized modpacks this modpack has a lot of optimized mod but it does not support modernfix and fastchests and sodium but i will make an copy of this modpack to be small version thats comes with fastchests and modernfix and sodium
